ops.body:
Resolved upstream and verified — no new commit/release from me. The concurrent plugin/hooks rework already fixed all 5 drift rows in v0.30.1 (cdf40e1d, "fix(hooks): pure mcp_active + deterministic record inline tests"), now on main and released as v0.31.0 (de470cd3). It used mode-agnostic patterns (NOT the MCP-form ones this task warned against): record.py:414/415/417 → Warn("Record a cc-notes log entry"), :547 → Warn("purge-bound path"), :757 → Warn("Native TaskCreate/TaskUpdate is your private"); :416 rsync ("cc-notes sync") and :632 ("attach") were already mode-agnostic.

Verified in BOTH modes:
- MCP-form (MCP-active shell, released pack cc-notes@de470cd3): every nudge_record_evidence / nudge_ephemeral_record_reference / nudge_plan_tasks row PASS. cc-notes `uvx capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test` → 573/573 passed, 0 failed. cc-context consumer → 868/868 passed, 0 failed, 0 non-PASS among the 3 nudges.
- CLI-form (non-MCP): cc-notes CI on main/v0.31.0 green (run 29308314559).

Criterion met. Closing.
